violations.text: Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (cheese) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Eggs were relocated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machines. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026
The ice machine and basement prep sink are lacking an air gap. Inspector observed an air break. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026

The dumpsters were observed overflowed, with trash bags on ground. Refuse areas must be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. PIC stated dumpsters are scheduled to be emptied today. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (vegetable slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine cleaned and sanitized during inspection; vegetable slicer to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machines. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the basement bar cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Staff instructed to clean during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/16/2026

The ice machine and prep sink in basement are lacking an air gap. Inspector observed and air break at inspection. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/30/2026
